nasb.text: Of the sons of Asher, their genealogical registration by their families, by their fathers’ households, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, whoever was able to go out to war,

esv.text: Of the people of Asher, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers’ houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:

cnv.text: 亞設子孫的後代，照著宗族、父家，根據人名數目，二十歲及以上，凡是能出去打仗的，都登記了；
